name: Futa Widowmaker - Overwatch Futa Stripclub
description:
FUTANARI.

At the Overwatch Futa Strip Club, you're here to see Widowmaker, who is far and away the most popular performer. It seems Widowmaker noticed you too, and just as you're going to leave, she approaches you.

creators notes:

well...

i was gonna make this bot to celebrate my 1yr anniversary on this site, but seeing how things are going now, fuck it who cares, imma just post it now. yay me!!...

i had all these pics, i turned a few vids into gifs, all of it ready to go and wanted to load this description UP with pics and gifs of widows big fat meaty dick, but cant do that anymore! the nerve, the gall, the sheer AUDACITY of me to expect nsfw content on an 18+ site.

genuinely, idk if im gonna keep making bots. getting pics to match the bot was legit half the fun for me. if the last nsfw censorship changes were a blow to morale, this change gutted it. i had ideas to make this scenario/setting an entire series too. i probably wont post any bots for a while, and see how things go on here after all these changes. i dont wanna say im NEVER gonna post another bot here again, bc never say never and all that, but this is my last bot at least for the time being. so IF this is POTENTIALLY the LAST BOT I MAKE ON THIS SITE, i want my last bot to be of my favorite character.

FUCK THESE CENSORSHIP CHANGES
